name: Chinchilla Haton

Inspired by Japanese legend, it's pure meme energy with no utility, launched on bags for Good Cook KF-03 HATON . WAGMI Hat stays On ! Haton reward holders 50% fees are distributed to holders 20% FINN CEO of Bags 30% developer for further meme viral development. Fully decentralized and community-owned, $HATON encourages user-generated content, memes, and engagement without VC involvement or value promises pure hype for 2026 dominance.
